parameters.content: To Customize the Range of Day to check customize here.

# 📅 Kimai — Deadline & Budget Monitor

## Monitors billable Kimai projects daily and sends an HTML alert email when a deadline is within 10 days or the hour budget exceeds 80%.

Runs every weekday at **9 AM**.
Fetches all billable projects and checks:
- End date within **10 days**
- Budget consumption **≥ 80%**

No alerts needed? No email sent.

## ⚙️ Customize

| What | Where |
|---|---|
| Days threshold | `Calculate expiration` → line 1 |
| Budget % alert | `Calculate expiration` → `getBudgetInfo()` |
| Kimai URL | All 3 HTTP Request nodes |
| Sender / Recipient | `Send an Email` node |
